title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/engine.py (第 70 至 430 行，共 767 行) ---
  70 |         if self.context._enable_memory_layers and user_input:
  71 |             try:
  72 |                 # 从长期记忆中检索与当前任务相关的摘要（跨所有会话）
  73 |                 long_term_memories = self.context.memory_manager.search_long_term(
  74 |                     query=user_input,
  75 |                     top_k=5  # 检索最相关的 5 条长期记忆
  76 |                 )
  77 |                 if long_term_memories:
  78 |                     print(f" [🧠] 检索到 {len(long_term_memories)} 条跨会话长期记忆")
  79 |             except Exception as e:
  80 |                 print(f" [⚠️] 长期记忆检索失败: {e}")
  81 | 
  82 |         # 🔥 新增：获取已完成任务列表
  83 |         completed_goals = self.plan_manager.get_completed_goals()
  84 | 
  85 |         system_ptr = get_system_prompt(
  86 |             summary=self.context.history_summary,
  87 |             plan=current_plan,
  88 |             episodic_memories=episodic_memories,
  89 |             session_summaries=session_summaries,
  90 |             long_term_memories=long_term_memories,  # 🔥🔥🔥 新增参数：跨会话长期记忆
  91 |             completed_goals=completed_goals,  # 🔥 新增参数
  92 |             user_input=user_input  # 🔥 新增：用于 CLAUDE.md 按需注入
  93 |         )
  94 | 
  95 |         # Phase 5: ContextAssembler 统一预算化装配。
  96 |         # get_system_prompt 仍负责生成兼容旧行为的基础 system prompt；主动召回的
  97 |         # relevant_history 作为 memory layer 交给 assembler，避免直接无预算拼接。
  98 |         messages_snapshot = await self.context.get_messages_snapshot()
  99 |         assembled_context = self.context_assembler.assemble(
 100 |             base_system_prompt=system_ptr,
 101 |             memory_context=relevant_history,
 102 |             compressed_state=self.context.history_summary,
 103 |             messages=messages_snapshot,
 104 |             provider="openai" if self.is_openai_compat else "anthropic",
 105 |             budget=ContextBudget(memory=self.memory_token_budget),
 106 |         )
 107 |         system_ptr = assembled_context.system_prompt
 108 |         messages_snapshot = assembled_context.messages
 109 | 
 110 |         if self.is_openai_compat:
 111 |             oa_tools = [{"type": "function", "function": {"name": t["name"], "description": t["description"], "parameters": t["input_schema"]}} for t in self.tool_specs]
 112 | 
 113 |             # 使用 await 调用异步客户端
 114 |             resp = await self.client.chat.completions.create(
 115 |                 model=self.model,
 116 |                 messages=[{"role": "system", "content": system_ptr}] + messages_snapshot,
 117 |                 tools=oa_tools if oa_tools else None
 118 |             )
 119 | 
 120 |             msg = resp.choices[0].message
 121 |             # 🔥 修复：转换为字典格式，避免后续 .get() 报错
 122 |             # 🔥🔥🔥 DeepSeek 修复：保存 reasoning_content（思考模式必须回传）
 123 |             self.last_oa_msg = {
 124 |                 "role": "assistant",
 125 |                 "content": msg.content or "",
 126 |             }
 127 |             # DeepSeek reasoning_content 回传：必须原样保存在消息历史中
 128 |             if hasattr(msg, 'reasoning_content') and msg.reasoning_content:
 129 |                 self.last_oa_msg["reasoning_content"] = msg.reasoning_content
 130 |             # 如果有工具调用，添加 tool_calls 字段
 131 |             if msg.tool_calls:
 132 |                 self.last_oa_msg["tool_calls"] = [
 133 |                     {
 134 |                         "id": tc.id,
 135 |                         "type": "function",
 136 |                         "function": {
 137 |                             "name": tc.function.name,
 138 |                             "arguments": tc.function.arguments
 139 |                         }
 140 |                     }
 141 |                     for tc in msg.tool_calls
 142 |                 ]
 143 | 
 144 |             content_blocks = []
 145 |             if msg.content:
 146 |                 content_blocks.append({"type": "text", "text": msg.content})
 147 |             if msg.tool_calls:
 148 |...

raw_observation.error:
